The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds and infections. The bioactive constituents of Herschelianthe longilabris include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
